trim_reasons: FG_COLD:-15% flag is active on a secondary creator who is already dependent on shot-making efficiency; audit history explicitly documents that Knueppel PTS missed in a prior FG_COLD context against a tough defense, and while MIA is soft today, a cold-shooting night with a thin margin at T10 is a documented fragility for this player type.

VOLATILE tag combined with FG_MARGIN_THIN (only 5% safety floor) means a single cold-shooting sequence leaves Miller short; the post_miss_hr lift is positive but typical_miss of 4 pts below means misses are not shallow — one bad night drops him well under the threshold.

Post-miss hit rate of only 50% (lift=+0.68) is materially below the overall 80% tier rate and well below any other pick on this slate; combined with FG_MARGIN_THIN (8%) and a tough CHA defense, Adebayo's PTS floor is genuinely fragile after a miss — the bounce-back effect is inverted here rather than supportive.

min_floor=0.0 is a critical red flag — a single DNP or early exit produces a miss with zero statistical cushion, and the system's own reasoning flagged this as critical; even at T10, minutes fragility at this level means the pick is contingent on Herro simply taking the floor for meaningful time, not on his scoring ability.

min_floor=23.9 is below the 24-minute structural threshold, meaning a single low-minutes game — well within normal variance for a secondary scorer — produces a miss; post_miss_hr of only 57% (lift=+0.70) also indicates Bridges does not reliably bounce back, making this floor doubly fragile.

min_floor=15.8 is severely below the 24-minute threshold — the lowest on the slate — meaning White's scoring floor is almost entirely contingent on minutes allocation, not scoring ability; with an average of only 18.7 minutes, any minor game-script deviation (CHA blowing out MIA or getting blown out early) compresses his floor below any viable threshold, and post_miss_hr of 60% offers no meaningful bounce-back cushion.

With avg_minutes of only 18.7, White's 3PM prop faces the same minutes-fragility structural risk as his PTS pick — a reduced role or early exit leaves insufficient shot attempts to clear even the T1 threshold, regardless of the strong 95% overall rate.
